def negative_exception_log_omits_operation_identifier_or_input_summary():
    rule_id = "exception_log_omits_operation_identifier_or_input_summary"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag exception logs that lose the operation context needed to diagnose failures."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
